official_ifs_route.lead_requirement: UK registered higher education institution, further education institution, research and technology organisation, or Catapult.
official_ifs_route.business_requirement: UK registered business partner with four or more full-time equivalent employees and minimum contribution basis.

findings.finding: Existing AKT6 artifacts consistently classify the route as knowledge-base-led. They identify QUB, Ulster, Invest NI and Belfast Met as outreach targets, not confirmed leads or authorised applicants.

A clean formal AKT6 portal text exists, but it explicitly leaves the eligible knowledge-base lead, authorised contact, four-FTE evidence, work package and budget to be completed from partner evidence.

Outreach-ready AKT6 evidence requests exist for QUB, Ulster, Invest NI and Belfast Met. They are suitable for evidence acquisition after action-time send approval, but they are not partner commitments.

findings.source: Google Drive: Aureon Grant War Room - 2026-07-04
findings.finding: The Drive war-room row confirms AKT6 is a partner-led route and says to ask QUB or Ulster whether they can lead before 15 July 2026. It does not include a signed or authorised lead confirmation.
The Drive operating log records academic and knowledge-transfer routes as requiring a knowledge-base partner. It does not include a later AKT6 lead, TTO contact, four-FTE proof, or budget commitment.

Local notes and draft outreach material were found, including references to QUB and Ulster. No signed lead confirmation, authorised TTO contact, four-FTE evidence, work package budget, or partner role confirmation was found.

decision.why_not_now: The current local, Drive and Aureon evidence set contains draft outreach and clean text, but not the authorised knowledge-base lead, four-FTE evidence, budget/work-package confirmation or signed role evidence required before an AKT6 IFS application can truthfully be opened or submitted.
decision.next_operator_action: Use the existing AKT6 outreach payloads to obtain an eligible knowledge-base lead and route evidence. Re-run this evidence delta immediately after any reply or partner document lands in Gmail, Drive or local folders.

controls: Local and Drive evidence references were classified for grant-side use only.
No IFS portal field was changed.
No IFS AKT6 draft was opened.
No external email, contact form, partner invite or upload action was performed.
No password, runtime secret, bank detail or private finance payload was written to this artifact.
No internal draft language was introduced into funder-facing text.
